post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 174 (Newbie Game 71) - geniosity Mafia

Story
Once upon a time, AoPS mafia had a discord. And once upon a time this discord was a pleasant place. But then e_is_cool became an oppressive, toxic, dictator admin-but-then-phi-rekt-him-and-demoted-him-and-he-somehow-miraculously-became-a-mod-again-due-to-loophole-abuse. And when he was an admin he carelessly demoted, kicked, and insulted poor innocent discord users who had no recourse at all. But then the hero phi came and rekt e and demoted him. Unfortunately, he still had the power to call others "scrub". This further intoxicated the discord.

One day, a hero came along by the name of fishy15. fishy started fighting against the toxicity of the discord by spreading love and geniosityness by calling others "geniosity". Those on the receiving end didn't necessarily deserve this either just like with "scrub", but with only positive side effects that's ok. Now, 7 geniosities take on the 2 scrubs who seek to destroy the pleasantness of the discord with their toxicity.


Credit to willwang and Binomial and all the other people who created the rules template, and credit to e for a lot of the role PM’s and credit to apw for giving credit to e. no credit to apw for not giving credit to summit and credit to summit. or something. And credit to GeneralCobra19 for being a meme.

Please read all the rules, especially if this is your first game.
Do not post if you are not in this game. No minecraft comments plsssss

Rules
  • Read the rules. Including this one.
  • Follow all the rules. Including this one.
  • Do not post at night.
  • You may PM me(or the comod) at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
  • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me or the comod, including role PMs. Do not play around with exploiting this rule.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the moderator or the comod, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
  • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
  • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • Do not pretend to edit or otherwise pretend to break a rule.
  • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
  • Do not edit the tags on the thread. This also applies if you are not playing the game.


Voting/Hangingses
  • This game is based on deadline hang. The player with the most votes at the time the deadline is reached is hanged. In the case of a tie, the hang is randomly decided among the players with the most votes. If you're ready to play call the mods geniosity. Starting Day 2, majority hang is enabled, which means day will end early if at any time a player has more than half the amount of total votes on them. If majority hang is not reached, deadline hang occurs.
  • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", "vote: fdas", "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: fdsa", "Vote: Fdas" and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • Improperly made votes (including votes in hide tags or any of the unacceptable forms above) will not be counted under any circumstances. I will not tell you if your vote is invalid. There is one exception to this; see below rule.
  • The characters "I" (capital i) and "l" (lowercase L) are considered the same character for the purpose of voting. That is, attempting to fakevote by substituting one of these characters in will not work.
  • You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
  • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day more than half of the players currently alive are voting for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
  • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • At a LyLo (hang or lose) situation, which is three town and two mafia, or two town and one mafia currently alive, votes are locked. This means that any attempt to unvote will be ignored, regardless of what the vote is.


Activity
  • Each day will be 336 hours (2 weeks). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • The deadline will occur the very second 336 hours has occurred.
  • Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
  • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
  • If a player does not post in a 24-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive an in-game prod.
  • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
  • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless he/she posts before the moderator finds a replacement.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. At the time when you have read this post and are ready to play(aka c onfirming), call e_is_cool a scrub. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.


Etiquette
  • Do not use inappropriate language.
  • Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Be mature.
  • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, SE’s up to one, and IC’s none. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled. Please do not make me modkill you.


Moderators
  • I (SFGiantsFan) am the Moderator of Game 165. tikkitamatoa is the co-moderator of Game 165. (whoops i meant 174 but hey i get to take over 174 with lazy modding too ayyyyyyyyyyyy)
  • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators.
  • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
  • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for other moderator stuff.
  • Please do not post in those colors or in any shades of those colors.
  • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules. The comod has second to last say, aka last say at that moment that they say, unless I have specified otherwise.


Setup
This game will use the Cop9'er setup. This is an open setup.

-1 Cop with random initial copcheck on a VT
-6 Vanilla Townies
-2 Mafia Goons

Role PM’s
Vanilla Townie Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a standard geniosity.

You have decided to follow fishy15 and spread love and kindness and geniosityness in the discord. Someday you hope to achieve enlightenmented geniosity. One day until then, you have no night actions, but your power comes in your voice and your vote.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.

You can find the game thread here.
Cop Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are fishy15.

As the leader of the geniosity revolution to spread anti-toxicity on the discord, you have achieved enlightenmented geniosity! This allows you to inspect other players and find their true alignments in this mess. Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to inspect. You will receive a result of innocent or guilty (town or mafia).

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You also know that ___ is town. You can find the game thread here.
Mafia Goon Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a scrub.

You love toxicity. You loathe geniosity. If you had one wish, you wouldn't use it, because that would be too geniosity for you. You're determined to undermine the spread of geniosityness and keep the discord toxic. Your mafia partner(s) are <partner(s)>. You may discuss in this quicktopic at night only. You may also decide on who to kill, which one of you or the other goon(s) will perform.

You win when the mafia obtain the majority and nothing can prevent this from occurring. For example, if the majority of the mafia is dead, you win and nothing can prevent that from happening. You can find the game thread here.


Alive (5)
  1. ++jeffisepic
  2. -GeneralCobra19
  3. AhirGauss
  4. zhangjzh hdgehrke
  5. duansaops


Dead (3)
  • jkittykitkat, standard geniosity (Vanilla Townie) was banned D1
  • NDMath, standard geniosity (Vanilla Townie) was D: ed D2
  • summitwei, fishy15 (Town Cop) was scrubbified N2
  • Made_in_2004, standard geniosity (Vanilla Townie) was hmmmed N3


Significant Events
jkittykitkat is hung D1
No one dies N1
NDMath is hung D2
summitwei dies N2
No one is hung D3
Made_in_2004 dies N3


Warnings
duansaops receives a warning for editing
AhirGauss receives a warning for posting during night


No posting until this line is crossed out.
______________________________________________________
The line is crossed out. Post

Current Deadline: Monday, November 19 at 11:30 AM PT (2:30 PM ET)

@made in: you're mostly correct that town should iso for the purpose of solving a player, while scum iso's for the purpose of pushing a hang. however, a lot of times town who is extremely confident in a scumread will do whatever it takes to get the scumread hanged and not even consider the player being town after that at all. this is called tunneling. in my opinion unaware tunneling is one of the worst things that can happen to a townie, and it's extremely difficult to distinguish a tunneling townie from a scum trying to build cases. so if it looks like someone is doing the iso with a clear intent of trying to find everything wrong with the other player, it's certainly antitown behavior, but antitown and scum are actually two different things.

[hide=hey]NDMath really liked studying. He was studying to be an enlightened geniosity. He was studying so hard that some people considered him geniosity. Unfortunately, in this sad, dark world of discord, geniosity is often looked down upon. GeneralCobra19, jeffisepic, summitwei, Made_in_2004, and duansaops were sure that NDMath was up to no good. In fact, they thought he was a scrub. So, one beautiful tuesday, the 5 of them banded together to take down the geniosity. Using his amazz Googling skillz, jeffisepic located NDMath's IRL address (gasp! stay safe kiddos). While NDMath was studying one day, GeneralCobra19 kicked down the geniosity's front door and yelled: [quote=GeneralCobra19]have you ever heard of outed wolf?
this is an outed wolf[/quote] NDMath stood up from his desk to figure out what was happening, but that but a terrible decision. Before he could figure out why his entryway was covered in wooden splinters, jeffisepic, summitwei, and Made_in_2004 rushed in from behind and tackled him to the ground. All the while, GeneralCobra19 yelled in the background: [quote=GeneralCobra19]hang hang hang[/quote][quote=GeneralCobra19]hang hang hang[/quote][quote=GeneralCobra19]hang hang hang[/quote]
Summitwei was quickly losing interest in the scheme. Despite being one of the most bestest people in the town, all he did was [quote=summitwei]sigh[/quote] Meanwhile, Made_in_2004 was distracted by another sketchy shadow in the window. Hence, the 4 conspirators were having a hard time keeping NDMath from escaping. But then, out of the purple, duansaops showed up! He paused at the door, taking account of the situation. Obviously, when 4 people are collectively up against 1 person, something interesting is going on. duansaops was confused for a while, but then Made_in_2004 told him to [quote=Made_in_2004]duansaops please speak.[/quote] Still confused, duansaops shrugged. [quote=duansaops]hmmmm[/quote], he said, scratching his head. [quote=duansaops]lol[/quote], he said, shrugging. He then went into the kitchen, found the stairs to the attic, located the bright red toolbox, and pulled out a nice shiny hammer.
